import torch
import torch.nn as nn

class DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.2):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)
        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0
        self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)
        self.out = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)
        )
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):
        s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)
        c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)
        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb], dim=-1)
        x = self.dropout(x)
        h, _ = self.gru(x)
        h = self.dropout(h)
        logits = self.out(h)
        return logits

class DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut_LN(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.2):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)
        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0
        self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)
        self.out = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)
        )
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):
        s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)
        c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)
        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb], dim=-1)
        x = self.dropout(x)
        h, _ = self.gru(x)
        h = self.dropout(h)
        logits = self.out(h)
        return logits

class DKT_Target_Features(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.2):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)
        self.attempt_emb = nn.Embedding(1000, 64)
        self.correct_attempt_emb = nn.Embedding(1000, 64)
        
        self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim * 2 + 128, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0)
        
        self.target_skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)
        
        self.out = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim + embed_dim + 128, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 1)
        )
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, attempts, correct_attempts, next_skills, next_attempts, next_correct_attempts):
        s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)
        c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)
        
        attempts = torch.clamp(attempts, 0, 999)
        correct_attempts = torch.clamp(correct_attempts, 0, 999)
        a_emb = self.attempt_emb(attempts)
        ca_emb = self.correct_attempt_emb(correct_attempts)
        
        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb, a_emb, ca_emb], dim=-1)
        x = self.dropout(x)
        
        h, _ = self.gru(x)
        h = self.dropout(h)
        
        next_s_emb = self.target_skill_emb(next_skills)
        
        next_attempts = torch.clamp(next_attempts, 0, 999)
        next_correct_attempts = torch.clamp(next_correct_attempts, 0, 999)
        next_a_emb = self.attempt_emb(next_attempts)
        next_ca_emb = self.correct_attempt_emb(next_correct_attempts)
        
        out_in = torch.cat([h, next_s_emb, next_a_emb, next_ca_emb], dim=-1)
        logits = self.out(out_in).squeeze(-1)
        return logits

class DKT_Target_Features_Ext(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.2):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)
        self.attempt_emb = nn.Embedding(5000, 64)
        self.correct_attempt_emb = nn.Embedding(5000, 64)
        self.recency_emb = nn.Embedding(5000, 32)
        
        self.cont_proj = nn.Linear(5, 32)
        
        self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim * 2 + 128 + 32 + 32, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0)
        
        self.target_skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)
        
        self.out = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim + embed_dim + 128 + 32 + 32, hidden_dim),
            nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 1)
        )
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, attempts, correct_attempts, total_corrects, recency, 
                next_skills, next_attempts, next_correct_attempts, next_total_corrects, next_recency):
        s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)
        c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)
        
        attempts_emb_idx = torch.clamp(attempts, 0, 4999)
        correct_attempts_emb_idx = torch.clamp(correct_attempts, 0, 4999)
        recency_emb_idx = torch.clamp(recency, 0, 4999)
        
        a_emb = self.attempt_emb(attempts_emb_idx)
        ca_emb = self.correct_attempt_emb(correct_attempts_emb_idx)
        r_emb = self.recency_emb(recency_emb_idx)
        
        B, T = skill_ids.shape
        device = skill_ids.device
        total_attempts = torch.arange(T, device=device).unsqueeze(0).expand(B, T).float()
        
        cont_feats = torch.stack([
            attempts.float() / 100.0,
            correct_attempts.float() / 100.0,
            total_attempts / 1000.0,
            total_corrects.float() / 1000.0,
            recency.float() / 100.0
        ], dim=-1)
        cont_emb = torch.relu(self.cont_proj(cont_feats))
        
        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb, a_emb, ca_emb, r_emb, cont_emb], dim=-1)
        x = self.dropout(x)
        
        h, _ = self.gru(x)
        h = self.dropout(h)
        
        next_s_emb = self.target_skill_emb(next_skills)
        
        next_attempts_emb_idx = torch.clamp(next_attempts, 0, 4999)
        next_correct_attempts_emb_idx = torch.clamp(next_correct_attempts, 0, 4999)
        next_recency_emb_idx = torch.clamp(next_recency, 0, 4999)
        
        next_a_emb = self.attempt_emb(next_attempts_emb_idx)
        next_ca_emb = self.correct_attempt_emb(next_correct_attempts_emb_idx)
        next_r_emb = self.recency_emb(next_recency_emb_idx)
        
        next_total_attempts = torch.arange(1, T+1, device=device).unsqueeze(0).expand(B, T).float()
        next_cont_feats = torch.stack([
            next_attempts.float() / 100.0,
            next_correct_attempts.float() / 100.0,
            next_total_attempts / 1000.0,
            next_total_corrects.float() / 1000.0,
            next_recency.float() / 100.0
        ], dim=-1)
        next_cont_emb = torch.relu(self.cont_proj(next_cont_feats))
        
        out_in = torch.cat([h, next_s_emb, next_a_emb, next_ca_emb, next_r_emb, next_cont_emb], dim=-1)
        logits = self.out(out_in).squeeze(-1)
        return logits
